name: Schema Validator Playground
description: An interactive web-based tool for validating JSON data against ZenKit schemas. Users select a schema, enter or paste JSON, and receive immediate validation results with detailed error messages.
acceptance_criteria: User can select from all available ZenKit schemas (handoff, task, audit, checkpoint, benchmark)
User can enter or paste JSON data into an editor area
Validation runs on demand when user clicks validate
Valid data shows a clear success indicator
Invalid data shows all validation errors with JSON paths and descriptions
Pre-loaded example data is available for each schema
constraints: Must work entirely client-side with no backend API calls
Must use the same schema validation library as the core ZenKit tooling (Ajv)
Must be accessible via keyboard navigation
Must be responsive for mobile and desktop

in_scope: JSON text editor with syntax indication
Error display with path and message
